response.justification: While the candidate has roughly 15 years of software engineering experience across a broad range of domains, the role demands recognized, deep AI/ML expertise and a demonstrated track record of building AI-powered products or platforms at strategic scale. The candidate's only AI-adjacent work — MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure — began two months ago and is implementation-level, not strategic. There is no cloud platform strategy background, no advisory or thought-leadership record in AI, and no evidence of the director-level influence and external recognition the role explicitly requires.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, embedded, low-latency, and GIS domains shows genuine technical breadth
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective (open-source platform, founder role, public conference talk) demonstrates product ownership and initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq is directionally relevant
concerns: No substantive AI/ML expertise — the only AI work is two months old and infrastructure-level, far short of the recognized AI authority the role requires
No cloud strategy or platform strategy experience; career is entirely individual-contributor product and systems development
No evidence of director-level influence, external advisory work, or the kind of executive-facing strategic engagement central to this role

key_factors.factor: No strategic or advisory track record
